practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the DP clues
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the right idea for Fibonacci, base cases, and repeated smaller work.
hints: Fibonacci uses the previous two answers.
Base cases are the first known tiny answers.
Repeated smaller work is a clue for DP.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You rebuilt the main DP clues.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck Fibonacci, base cases, and repeated smaller work.
